spaces.name: Bowie's Boardroom
spaces.description_long: A cozy yet fully equipped boardroom ideal for strategic discussions, leadership meetings or smaller team collaborations. Warm, professional and private – perfect for focused work.

spaces.name: Amazons' Meadow
layout_styles: Fully adaptable for theater-style, U-shape, boardroom or collaborative sessions
spaces.description_long: A spacious, flexible venue designed for presentations, workshops, team-building activities or larger group sessions. Bright, open and directly connected to the outdoor terrace – it adapts easily to your preferred layout.

spaces.name: Tokyo's Lounge
layout_styles: Flexible for formal or informal events
spaces.description_long: A stylish, relaxed meeting space that blends comfort with function. Ideal for informal strategy sessions, creative brainstorms, etc. With flexible setup and direct terrace access, it encourages open thinking and meaningful dialogue in a more laid-back atmosphere.
